working_signals: money-first proof with short ops breakdown

experiments.hypothesis: A proof-first X thread with a single CTA will drive more profile visits and clicks than a generic operator post.
experiments.variant_a: Operator-style post with workflow detail only
experiments.variant_b: Proof-first thread opening with live revenue or buyer outcome, then one CTA

experiments.hypothesis: A warm, specific follow-up to a recent engaged lead converts better than a broad broadcast reply.
experiments.variant_b: Context-specific follow-up referencing their exact pain and next step

experiments.hypothesis: Counterintuitive, money-first hooks outperform benefit-first hooks for attracting buyers in the founder audience.
experiments.variant_b: Counterintuitive headline with a concrete revenue number first
